scenario.name: Priya
scenario.key_situation: Father on call, ready to enroll today if price is right

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Hello! Main Priya bol rahi hun PhysicsWallah se. Aapne hamare NEET course ke baare mein inquiry ki thi. Am I speaking with the right person?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Haan, main Priya ka papa bol raha hun. Main hi inquiry ki thi. Priya NEET ki preparation kar rahi hai aur humein lagta hai usse proper guidance ki zarurat hai.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul sir, main samajh sakti hun. Priya currently kaunse class mein hai aur NEET kab dene wali hai?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Woh class 12th mein hai sir, aur is saal May mein NEET degi. Matlab sirf 5 mahine bache hain. Isliye thoda tension mein hain hum.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Sir 5 months ek achha time hai agar proper strategy aur guidance mil jaye. Priya currently kahan se padh rahi hai? Koi coaching join ki hai ya self-study kar rahi hai?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Hum Kota mein rehte hain sir. Yahan ek local coaching mein thi but wahan individual attention nahi mil raha. Teachers bahut busy rehte hain. Doubts clear nahi ho rahe properly.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: I understand sir. Kota mein competition bhi bahut hai aur sometimes individual attention kam mil pata hai. Priya ka current performance kaisa hai? Mock tests mein kitne marks aa rahe hain usually?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Sir honestly bolu to abhi tak 350-400 marks aa rahe hain mock tests mein. Humein lagta hai 500+ lane honge NEET mein qualify karne ke liye. Physics aur Chemistry thik hai but Biology mein kaafi gaps hain.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Sir 350-400 se 500+ bilkul achievable hai 5 months mein, especially Biology mein improvement ke saath. Priya din mein kitne ghante padh sakti hai currently?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Sir woh dedicated student hai. 8-10 ghante easily padh leti hai. Bus proper direction chahiye. Aur main chahta hun ki ghar baith kar hi acchi preparation ho jaye.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect sir! Priya ke liye main hamare NEET Lakshya batch recommend karungi jo specifically last 6 months ke students ke liye designed hai. Isme complete syllabus revision, chapter-wise tests, aur Biology ke liye special focus modules hain.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Accha, isme kya kya milega exactly? Aur teachers kaun hain? Alakh sir padhayenge kya?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Sir isme aapko milega - Physics mein Alakh sir ke lectures, Chemistry mein Pankaj sir, aur Biology ke liye Vipin sir jo NEET Biology ke expert hain. Daily 4-5 hours ke live classes, recorded lectures, weekly tests, aur doubt clearing sessions bhi hain.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yeh sab online hoga na? Priya ko offline jaane ki zarurat nahi padegi? Aur kitne students hote hain ek batch mein?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul sir, completely online hai. Live classes hain fixed timings par, aur agar koi miss ho jaye to recorded bhi mil jata hai. Batch mein around 200-300 students hote hain but doubt sessions mein individual attention milta hai.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Theek hai. Ab main important baat puchta hun - price kya hai is course ka? Aur installments mein pay kar sakte hain kya?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Sir NEET Lakshya batch ki fee hai 15,000 rupees for complete 5 months. Isme sab kuch included hai - live classes, study material, test series, doubt sessions. Aur haan, installments mein bhi kar sakte hain - 3 EMIs mein.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: 15,000 reasonable lagta hai sir. Kya guarantee hai ki Priya ka score improve hoga? Aur agar koi problem ho to refund policy kya hai?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Sir hum guarantee to nahi de sakte kyunki ultimately student ki mehnat matter karti hai. But hamare 90% students improve karte hain significantly. Refund policy hai - agar 15 days mein course pasand nahi aaye to full refund mil jata hai.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Accha yeh fair hai. Main Priya se baat kar leta hun. Woh abhi school se aayegi to confirm kar dunga. Aaj enroll kar sakte hain kya?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul sir! Aaj enroll kar sakte hain. Main aapko enrollment link bhej dungi. Priya se baat karne ke baad agar decision final ho jaye to payment kar dena. Classes Monday se start ho rahi hain nayi batch ki.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Perfect timing hai sir. Main payment kar deta hun aaj hi. Priya ready hai, bas main confirmation chahta tha. Link send kar dijiye.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Wonderful sir! Main abhi WhatsApp par enrollment link aur payment details send kar rahi hun. Priya ka NEET journey successful banane mein hum puri help karenge. Koi aur questions hain?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Bas ek last question - agar coaching ke saath saath yeh course kare to overlap to nahi hoga na? Time management issues?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Sir actually many students parallel chalate hain. PW ke lectures evening mein hain usually, to morning coaching aur evening PW kar sakti hai Priya. Plus recorded lectures hain flexibility ke liye.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Perfect! Main convinced hun sir. Payment details send kar dijiye, main abhi kar deta hun. Thank you for explaining everything clearly.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Thank you so much sir! Main right now details send kar rahi hun. Priya ki NEET preparation successful hogi, main confident hun. All the best! Koi doubt ho to call kar lena anytime.
